questions.question: A hiker travels $24 \cdot 5$ miles in a day. What is the remainder when this distance is divided by $9$?
Which number is divisible by $2$ and $5$ but not by $9$?
A park ranger tracks the population of deer. If the population increases by $150$ deer per year, what is the remainder when the total population after $7$ years is divided by $10$?
What is the result of $48 \div 6$ with remainder?
A fuel tank can hold $240$ gallons. If $120$ gallons are already filled, what fraction of the tank is filled?
A mountain trail is $54$ km long. What is the remainder when the length of the trail is divided by $9$?
If a bird sanctuary has $135$ birds and $15$ more birds arrive, what is the remainder when the new total is divided by $10$?
A group of friends want to share some candy equally. If they have $48$ pieces of candy and there are $8$ friends, what is the remainder when the candy is divided?
A car travels $225$ miles on a full tank of gas. If the gas tank holds $15$ gallons, how many gallons of gas are used per mile? Show your work and express your answer as a fraction or decimal.

A conservationist is tracking the growth of a wolf population. If the population doubles every $5$ years and there are currently $18$ wolves, how many wolves will there be in $15$ years? Show your work and express your answer as an integer.

teacher_rules: Use the back of the page for calculations if needed
Show all work for free response questions
